suppress.notes: Should be fixed with jackson 2.21.5 release - see https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson/wiki/Jackson-Release-2.21.5
Fix is dependent on gov notify client migrating to httpclient5 - https://github.com/alphagov/notifications-java-client/issues/267
Suppress until org.springframework.cloud and uk.gov.hmcts.reform/service-auth-provider-client upgrade their org.bouncycastle dependents
